h1: LG Soundbar S65TR — 5.1 Channel Surround Sound with Wireless Subwoofer and Rear Speakers

gallery.a: Front view of LG Soundbar S65TR 5.1ch with subwoofer and rear speakers
Angled view of complete S65TR system — soundbar, subwoofer and rear speakers
Front view of the main soundbar
Top view of the soundbar control surface
Side corner detail of the soundbar
Back of soundbar showing connection ports
Angled view of wireless rear speakers
Back view of wireless rear speakers

modules.head: The ideal sound companion for your LG TV
modules.body: Complete the LG TV experience with a soundbar that beautifully complements its design and sonic performance — premium finish, flawless audio synchronisation, and a unified aesthetic.

imgs.a: LG Soundbar S65TR against a black backdrop, highlighted by a spotlight

modules.head: Captivating sound all around
modules.body: Become part of the scene with true 5.1-channel surround sound delivered by the main soundbar, wireless subwoofer, and two wireless rear speakers — for a cinematic experience right in your living room.

imgs.a: LG Soundbar S65TR system in a living room delivering immersive 5.1ch surround sound

modules.head: Seamlessly pair with your LG TV
modules.body: WOW Orchestra plays TV and soundbar speakers simultaneously for richer audio. WOW Interface integrates soundbar control into your LG TV's menu — so a single LG remote handles everything.
modules.disc: *WOW Orchestra and WOW Interface compatibility depends on LG TV model and year. Software update may be required.

imgs.a: LG remote pointing at LG TV showing the WOW Interface menu with soundbar controls

modules.head: Rear speakers embrace wireless freedom
modules.body: Install the 2-channel rear speakers with minimal cable clutter — they connect wirelessly to the main soundbar. You only need one power cable per speaker, keeping your room elegant and clean.

imgs.a: Two wireless rear speakers positioned behind the sofa for surround effect

modules.head: Rich surround from every direction
modules.body: Dedicated 2.0-channel rear speakers add a whole new dimension to movies, sports and music — creating a wraparound soundstage that pulls you into the action.

imgs.a: Immersive rear speaker placement behind sofa for surround effect

modules.head: Every mood and genre sounds right
modules.body: AI Sound Pro intelligently analyses the on-screen content — movie, music or voice — and applies the ideal settings in real time for the optimal audio experience without manual tweaking.

imgs.a: AI Sound Pro analysing three different TV scenes: action movie, music concert, and news broadcast

modules.head: Internal parts made with recycled plastic
modules.body: Built with sustainability in mind — internal components use recycled plastic, reducing environmental impact without compromising on performance.
modules.disc: *Recycled plastic usage varies by component. See product specification for full material breakdown.

imgs.a: Metal frame of the soundbar highlighting recycled plastic components

modules.head: Jersey fabric made with plastic bottles
modules.body: The front grill fabric is reborn from recycled plastic bottles — repurposed as durable polyester jersey, giving the soundbar a premium finish with a lower carbon footprint.

imgs.a: Plastic bottles recycled into polyester jersey fabric used in the soundbar

specs.v: Soundbar + Wireless Subwoofer + 2× Wireless Rear Speakers
Internal parts + grill fabric from recycled plastic bottles
